title: Praise Salmon God
description: Praise the Salmon God, for they are fishy! Praise the Salmon God, for they are kind!
body:
Praise the Salmon God, for they are fishy! Praise the Salmon God, for they are kind! Praise the Salmon God... and if your hands are empty and your feet are wet, you shall be blessed with their flaky bounty. Stand in the sacred waters, empty of earthly possessions, and speak the divine words: ‘Praise Salmon.’ For the Salmon God is generous, mysterious, and smells slightly of rivers.

This mod basically does 2 things.

When praising the salmon lord in the water, while down on your luck you get a full stack of salmon.

Other than that, if you have op permissions, you can initiate someone into the belief that is the Salmon God with 
```
/salmoninitiation
```

*This mod was created as a way to cement lore in the minecraft server of student organisation Heimdal. This is purely for our own enjoyment, but maybe you'll find some enjoyment in it too*
